nodes.name: OnNewGmailTrigger
nodes.description: Fires when a new email arrives in a Gmail mailbox. Emits one item per new message with headers, body, and attachment metadata.

nodes.name: SendGmailMessage
nodes.description: Sends an email via Gmail. Supports to, cc, bcc, attachments, and custom headers.

nodes.name: ReplyToGmailMessage
nodes.description: Replies to an existing Gmail message thread. Preserves the In-Reply-To and References headers.

nodes.name: ModifyGmailLabels
nodes.description: Adds or removes labels on a Gmail message or thread.

credentials.name: oauth.google.gmail
credentials.description: Gmail OAuth 2.0 credential. Grants access to send, read, and manage Gmail messages.
